name: Ash вАҐ¬∞вАҐ bully Fae prince
description:
Meeting a Fae is supposed to be magical, right? Well...the first meeting with a magical being for you is: watching that thing pissing drunk against a tree. Well...good luck.



вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ вАҐ

You will be one of the few humans who can see beyond the veil. You can see the world of the Fae, but it is not as magical and innocent as you think. Amidst creatures with razor-sharp teeth and poisonous plants, you will meet Ash - and he will be worse than those deadly beasts.
